About Me

I am currently a research resident at FPT Software AI Residency program under the mentorship of Dr. Duy-Dung Le (Assist. Prof. at VinUniversity). Before that, I was a research assistant at College of Engineering and Computer Science, VinUniversity in early 2023, and VinUni-Illinois Smart Health Center (VISHC) in 2022, where I was mentored by Dr. Duy-Dung Le and Dr. Huy-Hieu Pham (VinUni) under the supervision of Prof. Minh Do (UIUC). Before VinUni, I worked as an undergraduate research assistant from 2019 to 2021 at University of Information Technology, Vietnam National University - Ho Chi Minh City under the supervision of Assoc. Prof. Duc-Lung Vu and achieved a Bachelor degree there in late 2020.

I am actively looking for a Ph.D. position in Computer Science starting Fall 2024, working on the fundamental research of meta-learning (few-shot/zero-shot learning), domain adaptation (particularly continual learning, OOD detection,…), and black-box optimization (e.g. Bayesian Optimization) for machine learning, deep learning, and computer vision.


Email /  GitHub /  Scholar /  Twitter /  CV

 

Research interests

My research interests are including meta-learning, domain adaptation, and black-box optimization for general computer vision problems. My research goal is to develop machine learning algorithms that can be generalized/optimized with minimal training data or human supervision and effectively shifted into other domains out-of-distribution for computer vision-oriented tasks (but not necessarily limited to vision). I am also interested in exploring the connection between optimization and machine learning toward effective lifelong and open-world AI systems.

 

News

  • December, 2023: Our preprint paper about Expensive Multi-objective Optimization is published on arXiv. You can check it here.

  • 21-25th, August, 2023: I participate in the 10th Vietname Summer School of Science at ICISE, Quy Nhon, Vietnam.

  • August, 2023: I start a new role as AI research resident at FPTSoftware AI Center, Ho Chi Minh City, working on Diffusion model for OOD object detection and multi-objective Bayesian optimization tasks.

  • July, 2023: Our paper Few-shot Cosine Transformer is accepted at IEEE Access.

  • February, 2023: I start a new role as research assistant at College of Engineering and Computer Science, VinUniversity, working on object-level OOD Detection and expensive multi-objective optimization tasks.

  • Jan, 2022: I start a new role as Research Assistant at VinUni-Illinois Smart Health Center (VISHC), VinUniversity.

  • Dec, 2020: I graduate bachelor degree at the University of Information Technology, VNU-HCM.

  • Jul, 2019: I become a Research assistant at University of Information Technology, VNU-HCM.

 

Selected Publications

  1. Quang-Huy Nguyen*, Long P. Hoang*, Hoang V. Vu, and Dung D. Le. Controllable Expensive Multi-objective Optimization with Warm-starting Gaussian Processes. arXiv:2311.15297, 2023.

  2. Quang-Huy Nguyen, Cuong Q. Nguyen, Dung D. Le, and Hieu H. Pham. Enhancing Few-shot Image Classification with Cosine Transformer. IEEE Access, 2023.

  3. Dinh-Duy Phan, Quang-Huy Nguyen, Thanh-Thien Nguyen, Hoang-Loc Tran, and Duc-Lung Vu. Joint inter-intra representation learning for pornographic video classification. Indonesian Journal of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science, 2022.

  4. Hoang-Loc Tran, Quang-Huy Nguyen, Dinh-Duy Phan, Thanh-Thien Nguyen, Khac-Ngoc-Khoi Nguyen, and Duc-Lung Vu. Additional learning on object detection: A novel approach in pornography classification. In International Conference on Future Data and Security Engineering. Springer, 2020.

  5. Quang-Huy Nguyen, Khac-Ngoc-Khoi Nguyen, Hoang-Loc Tran, Thanh-Thien Nguyen, Dinh-Duy Phan, and Duc-Lung Vu. Multi-level detector for pornographic content using CNN models. In 2020 RIVF international conference on computing and communication technologies (RIVF). IEEE, 2020.

“Only those who seek shall find!”
